checkpointsPath.description: CheckpointsPath configures path to file where logs checkpoints are stored. By default it's stored at host's /var/lib/vlagent-data/checkpoints.json.

decolorizeFields.description: DecolorizeFields defines fields to remove ANSI color codes across logs ingested from Kubernetes

enabled.description: Enabled switches VLAgent to log collection mode. Note, for this purpose operator uses DaemonSet, while by default VLAgent uses StatefulSet. Switching this option will drop all persisted data.

excludeFilter.description: ExcludeFilter defines logsql expression that allows to filter out containers to collect logs from

extraFields.description: ExtraFields defines extra fields as JSON string which should be added to each collected log line Example: '{"env":"dev","cluster":"staging"}'

ignoreFields.description: IgnoreFields defines fields to ignore across logs ingested from Kubernetes

includeNodeAnnotations.description: IncludeNodeAnnotations enables attachment of node annotations to log entries

includeNodeLabels.description: IncludeNodeLabels enables attachment of node labels to log entries

includePodAnnotations.description: IncludePodAnnotations enables attachment of pod annotations to log entries

includePodLabels.description: IncludePodLabels enables attachment of pod labels to log entries

logsPath.description: LogsPath configures root for logs path By default VLAgent collects logs from /var/log/containers

msgFields.description: MsgField defines fields that may contain the _msg field

streamFields.description: StreamFields defines list of fields to use as log stream fields for logs ingested from Kubernetes Pods

tenantID.description: TenantID defines default tenant ID to use for logs collected from pods in format: <accountID>:<projectID>

timeFields.description: TimeFields defines fields that may contain the _time field
